metaData.Key Information:
• Provides instant soothing relief and long lasting comfort for all contact lens wearers
• Relieves dryness and irritation
• Suitable for use with all types of contact lenses including disposables
metaData.Preparation:
• Place 1 or 2 drops in each affected eye
• Use as required
• No need to remove contact lenses
• For extra comfort, place 1 or 2 drops in each lens before inserting
Precautions:
• Do not swallow solution
• Do not use if allergic reaction to any of the ingredients
• To avoid contamination, do not touch bottle tip on any surface, avoid direct contact with eye
• Close bottle tightly immediately after use
• Discard any remaining solution 60 days after opening
• Do not use after expiry date
• If you have continued problems please discuss with your lens care practitioner
metaData.Storage Information:
• Keep out of the reach of children
• Store at room temperature

product.description:
Product Highlights:
- Enable breastfeeding when latching on is difficult or painful or if you have flat or inverted nipples
- Protect sensitive, dry or cracked nipples during breastfeeding
- Made from transparent, ultra-thin, soft silicone that's comfortable on sensitive skin
- Safe and taste-free for your baby
- Shape maximises skin contact between you and your baby
- BPA free
What's in the box?
2 x Contact nipple shields
1 x handy box
Product Dimensions: 2.5 x 2.5 x 2.5 cm
Item Weight: 30 g
Material Type: Silicone
Size Guide
Available in three sizes: S/16 mm, M/20 mm or L/24 mm.

metaData.Key Information:
- Medela Contact Nipple Shield.
- Nipple shields make breastfeeding possible when latching on is difficult or painful by protecting sore nipples and helping your baby attach more easily.
- Medela Contact Nipple Shields help you breastfeed your baby if you have flat, inverted or sore nipples or an overactive let-down.
metaData.Preparation:
How to use:
After washing your hands with drinking-quality water and drying them thoroughly, grip the wings of the Contact nipple shield to guide it into place. Moistening the shield with drinking-quality water will help it stick. See the Contact nipple shield instructions for full details of how to put them on.The nipple shield should fit comfortably on your nipple without pinching - Medela nipple shields come in three sizes, so you can find the best fit for your type of nipple. Remember you'll need to clean them after each use and disinfect once a day - this is often easiest using a microwave sanitising bag - see instructions for details of cleaning and sanitising. Contact nipple shields come with a convenient carry case so you can keep them safe between uses.

product.name: MEDELA Contact Nipple Shield 24mm - Size L
